data.requirement: Merge Student.Major with Department.DNO and DName to map academic majors to department names, joining with Minor_in to identify secondary disciplines
data.reason: Original DNO binning approach prevented meaningful departmental distinctions. Direct DName mapping preserves semantic clarity while maintaining relationships
Redundant with heatmap visualization (V2) and lacking clear implementation path. Major-minor pair frequencies already provide sufficient combinatorial analysis

visualization.requirement: Horizontal bar chart showing student counts per department using DName labels (instead of DNO ranges)
visualization.reason: Avoids unreadable numerical bins and leverages meaningful department names from Department.DName join

visualization.requirement: Replace box plots with grouped bar chart showing average GPA per major using Department.DName labels
visualization.reason: Complies with interaction constraints while maintaining performance comparisons. Error bars can show distribution characteristics

interaction.requirement: Replace DNO range dropdown with department name multi-select filter using Department.DName
interaction.reason: More interpretable for users than numerical ranges and matches updated data requirements
Original design violated constraint against box plot interactions. GPA filtering can be integrated via brushing in scatter plots later
